briefdescription.para: This function reports list of cores included in DisplayPort TX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function computes multi-stream attribute and populates frame rate, pixel clock and so on.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
is the stream number for which the MSA values will be computed for.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether RX device in multi-stream (MST) / Single Stream transport mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if DisplayPort TX initialization failed or RX device is not connected.
XST_SUCCESS if RX device check is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DisplayPort TX subsystem sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if all sub-cores configuration failed.
XST_SUCCESS if all sub-cores configuration was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the DisplayPort Transmitter Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the core includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if sub-core not found.
XST_FAILURE if sub-core initialization failed.
XST_SUCCESS if XDpTxSs_CfgInitialize successful.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the DisplayPort Transmitter Subsystem including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the DisplayPort Transmitter Subsystem including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if DP TX Subsystem and its included sub-cores configured successfully.
XST_FAILURE, otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the DisplayPort Transmitter Subsystem with custom multi-stream attributes (MSA)including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
is the structure that will be used to copy the main stream attributes from (into InstancePtr->DpPtr->TxInstance.MsaConfig).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if DP TX Subsystem and its included sub-cores configured successfully.
XST_FAILURE, otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the DisplayPort Transmitter Subsystem sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables special timing mode for BS equal timing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables special timing mode for BS equal timing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the bits per color value of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

is the new number of bits per color that needs to be set.
6 = XVIDC_BPC_6,
8 = XVIDC_BPC_8,
10 = XVIDC_BPC_10,
12 = XVIDC_BPC_12,
16 = XVIDC_BPC_16,

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if bits per color set successfully.
XST_FAILURE, if bits per color set failed.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the standard display mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.
is one of the enumerated standard video modes that is used to determine the MSA values to be used.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if video mode set successfully.
XST_FAILURE, if video mode set failed.

simplesect.para: Refer xvidc.h for enumerated standard video modes.

briefdescription.para: This function overrides the Horizontal and Vertical Sync signals.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.
is the stream number for which to set the MSA values for.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the data rate to be used by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

is the rate at which link needs to be driven.
XDPTXSS_LINK_BW_SET_162GBPS = 0x06(for a 1.62 Gbps data rate)
XDPTXSS_LINK_BW_SET_270GBPS = 0x0A(for a 2.70 Gbps data rate)
XDPTXSS_LINK_BW_SET_540GBPS = 0x14(for a 5.40 Gbps data rate)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the new lane rate was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

simplesect.para: Maximum supported link rate is used if given link rate is greater than the maximum supported link rate.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the number of lanes to be used by DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

is the number of lanes to be used.
1 = XDPTXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_1
2 = XDPTXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_2
4 = XDPTXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_4

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the new lane count was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

simplesect.para: Maximum supported lane count is used if given lane count is greater than the maximum supported lane count.

briefdescription.para: This function sets transport mode (SST/MST).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

specifies the type of transport mode that will be set.
0 = Single-Stream Transport mode,
1 = Multi-Stream Transport mode,

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if transport mode is set successfully to either MST or SST when RX device is MST and mode is less than or equal to supported mode.
XST_FAILURE, if setting to already set mode or mode is greater than supported mode.

simplesect.para: Transport mode is set to either MST or SST when system is MST and RX device is MST capable.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the RX device's capabilities from the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DisplayPort Configuration Data was read successfully.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves an immediately connected RX device's Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
is a pointer to the Edid buffer to save to.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the I2C transactions to read the EDID were successful.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the EDID read request timed out.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves a remote RX device's Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
is the Sink ID in the sink list within the range [0 to 3].
is a pointer to the Edid buffer to save to.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the I2C transactions to read the EDID were successful.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the EDID read request timed out.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if there is a connected RX device to DisplayPort TX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if there is a connection.
FALSE if there is no connection.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the receiver's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) indicates the receiver has achieved and maintained clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment for all lanes currently in use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device has maintained clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the number of pixels output through the user data interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
is the user pixel width to be configured.
is the stream number.

briefdescription.para: This function returns number of downstream MST sink devices enumerated and available for payload allocation .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: Number of MST sinks to be enabled for payload allocation

briefdescription.para: This function determines whether downstream RX device is MST/SST capable.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device is MST enabled.
XST_FAILURE if the RX device is SST enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function sets software switch that specify whether or not a redriver exits on the DisplayPort output path.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.
establishes that a redriver exists in the DisplayPort output path. 1 = Set redriver in the DisplayPort output path. 0 = Unset redriver in the DisplayPort output path.

simplesect.para: Set the redriver in the DisplayPort output path before starting the training.
